tiers.volatile: Ephemeral by design; lives on tmpfs; loss on reboot is correct behavior.
tiers.durable: Persistent LifeOS-owned state; must survive any reboot, kernel swap, or desktop crash byte-identically.
tiers.portable: Travels with the released closure; store-independent at release time.

entries.name: CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR
entries.note: Agent config/session runtime; wiped by the 2026-07-21 reboot because it sits on host tmpfs. Owned by ARCHBP-072/ARCHBP-131.

entries.name: CODEX_HOME
entries.note: Codex agent state on host tmpfs today; same relocation lane as CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR.

entries.name: YAZELIX_STATE_DIR
entries.note: Session/zellij state; the live session binds it, so relocation is restart-gated (ARCHBP-076).

entries.name: XDG_DATA_HOME
entries.note: Already redirected to the meta durable tier by the envctl bootstrap rows.

entries.name: XDG_STATE_HOME
entries.note: Already redirected to the meta durable tier by the envctl bootstrap rows.

entries.name: ICM_DB
entries.note: Persistent memory database; the only supported override for the ICM store location.

entries.name: postgres-datadir
entries.note: PostgreSQL 17.10 + RuVector canonical macro-state — the Swarm Primary Runtime datadir.

entries.name: redb-plane
entries.note: Transient shared low-latency plane; file-backed ACID buffer whose durability requirement is crash-replay, not canonical truth.

entries.name: claude-session-transcripts
entries.note: 409 jsonl transcripts survived the 2026-07-21 reboot precisely because they were NOT on tmpfs — but they live in a home residual that path-law retires (ARCHBP-078/ARCHBP-131).

entries.name: profile-runtime
entries.note: Generated agent runtime tree currently parasitized onto host systemd tmpfs; the root cause of the 2026-07-21 session loss.

entries.name: cargo-target
entries.note: Build product cache; disk-backed by policy (never tmpfs for large builds) but reproducible — correctly ephemeral in contract even when disk-backed.

entries.name: rustup-toolchains
entries.note: Re-downloadable toolchains; correctly volatile on tmpfs.

entries.name: build-tmp
entries.note: Scratch space including agent scratchpads; correctly volatile.

entries.name: runner-work-root
entries.note: Self-hosted runner work root re-materializes a home residual; re-pointed by ARCHBP-079, residual deleted by ARCHBP-080.

entries.name: nix-profile-frontdoor
entries.note: Development-time store-backed frontdoor; at release time its closure ships inside the portable bundle (I09/I17).

entries.name: release-closure
entries.note: The released closure travels with the app (relocatable/embedded store or static-musl); decided by ARCHBP-134.

entries.name: gitkb-database
entries.note: Knowledge-base database on the durable tier.

entries.name: envctl-tables
entries.note: envctl bootstrap/committer tables — the sole authoritative env committer's own state.
